title: Subtract within 10
description: Practice subtracting by "taking apart" (with numbers less than 10).

assessment_items.question_content:
$7$ mice are playing.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/41258e330a8edd9af8b78b3b2d336e17.png)

$5$ mice are playing inside.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] mice are playing outside.**
hints:
$\blue7$ mice are playing.  
$\pink5$ mice are inside.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ff8fd5175b61b7091c1970726aefd31a.png)
$\blue7-\pink5=\green2$

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c1a6d276fec3650115962027c2e0ad36.png)

$\green2$ mice are outside.

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $7$ squirrels.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/70f5c426559c1770dbd920d4ca7caddf.png)

$4$ of them are friendly.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] are not friendly.**
hints:
There are $\blue7$ squirrels.  
$\green4$ of them are friendly.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8ce19efd1612ed923046a131a7f30fce.png)
$\blue7-\green4=\pink3$

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e348e77b75493feebec16d3d06747d09.png)
$\pink3$ are not friendly.

assessment_items.question_content:
A bird laid $6$ eggs.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/00b4ffd27ec322e77f98584bd1a0ac31.png)

$4$ eggs have hatched.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] eggs have not hatched.**

Puppy Pete hid $6$ bones.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aebee1f43774f4a412e10d2340051de4.png)

He hid $2$ bones outside.  

**He hid [[☃ input-number 1]] bones inside.**
hints:
There are $\blue6$ bones.  
He hid $\green2$ bones outside.   

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cd029ed7e7a34d35bf455e519a11514b.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
$8$ cows are playing soccer.  The $\green{\text{green}}$ team is playing the $\pink{\text{pink}}$ team.

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/519630cfb44a256dcaf8092298e8b648.png)

$4$ are on the $\green{\text{green}}$ team.  

**$$[[☃ input-number 1]] are on the $\pink{\text{pink}}$ team.**
hints:
There are $\blue8$ cows.  
$\green4$ are on the $\green{\text{green}}$ team.   

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8563c5e3d86ca73e6041be3788256031.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
There were $7$ hens.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/46a81d2a365d541a0143cdda64e6deea.png)

$2$ hens fell asleep.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] hens are awake.**

$8$ people each ate a hot dog.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3985b2b9024cde3fead982db30be8d2b.png)

$2$ were adults.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] were kids.**
hints:
$\blue8$ people ate hot dogs.  
$\green2$ were adults.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bf7827eda968d7e7608850bb10bc5f8a.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
A farmer has $8$ sheep.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6d60444c466d93bb73327964a1c12afa.png)

$7$ sheep are in the barn.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] sheep is not in the barn.**
hints:
There are $\blue8$ sheep.  
$\green7$ are in the barn.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6805588c49ff3258f229bd80be45869.png)
$\pink1$ sheep is not in the barn.

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $6$ rabbits.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/454886d9113b50d76f9929673b7097cd.png)

$3$ rabbits like carrots.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] rabbits do not like carrots.**
hints:
There are $\blue6$ rabbits.  
$\green3$ rabbits like carrots.   

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9898cd8df68824f07ad7e694f83e626de6b5e635)

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $9$ turtles.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8b540799304951850122894c0b4b783e.png)

$7$ turtles are swimming.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] turtles are not swimming.**

There are $9$ seals.   

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e7ec3346c026ec9fa9f5cfc0e4882668.png)

$3$ seals ate a fish.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] seals did not eat a fish.**
hints:
There are $\blue9$ seals.  
$\green3$ ate a fish.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/144e8d76179a353093be375a9b6a3c0d.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $9$ pigs.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a9ff47c3a3f00e8fd152aef6b8d7a026.png)

$4$ pigs are in the mud.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] pigs are not in the mud.**
hints:
There are $\green9$ pigs.  
$\red4$ are in the mud.   

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/496ef84abd38f7f45c2374dffaf00da6355456c5)
$\blue5$ pigs are not in the mud.

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $10$ penguins.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f0727b54d182652669ed75bbe983807b.png)

$8$ of them like flowers.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] do not like flowers.**

There are $10$ raccoons.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3389d36fc00c8710e2469de0273b45ed.png)

$6$ are fast.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] are not fast.**

There are $5$ chicks.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e6a4bfb8c26caed0be8c541ac8d3a6dd.png)

$3$ chicks fell asleep.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] chicks are awake.**

$4$ people ate ice cream.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/112e198d9e83d7b6f80132083e3b9733.png)

$1$ was a child.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] were adults.**
hints:
$\blue4$ people ate ice cream.  
$\green1$ was a child.  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8532c1a7d7085a70311fad23d869c2cb.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
There are $4$ dogs.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/60fe987a2fb04d6d34af02f835eec04d.png)

$2$ dogs have collars.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] dogs have no collar.**

There are $3$ otters.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b7c4750f62695541ffc26808e7b09aab.png)

$2$ are swimming.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] is not swimming.**

There are $10$ walruses.  

$\qquad\quad$![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e2a0751db845e01bd4b7c8dbfb1ee922.png)

$2$ fell asleep.  

**[[☃ input-number 1]] are awake.**
